progress.fetching_token: Authenticating with your SMA EV Charger…
progress.fetching_devices: Loading devices from your SMA EV Charger…

user.title: Connect to SMA EV Charger
user.description: Enter the connection details for your SMA EV Charger.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your SMA EV Charger (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.username: Your SMA EV Charger login username
data_description.password: Your SMA EV Charger login password

device_selection_form.title: Select devices
device_selection_form.description: Choose which devices you want to add to Home Assistant.

device_selection_error.title: Failed to load devices
device_selection_error.description: Could not load devices from your SMA EV Charger. Click Submit to try again or go back and check your connection details.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.fetching_token_failed: Could not authenticate with the SMA EV Charger. Check the host and try again.
error.fetching_devices_failed: Could not load devices from the SMA EV Charger. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This SMA EV Charger is already configured.
